(R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V)
MERGE (r:Rule {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_75_V'})) SET r.text='Building(?b)^hasHeightM(?b,?h)->swrlb:greaterThan(?h,75)->violatesMaxHeight(?b,true)', r.kind='violation'
MERGE (C_Building:Class {iri:'ex:Building'}})
MERGE (DP_H:DatatypeProperty {iri:'ex:hasHeightM'}}))
MERGE (B_gt:Builtin {iri:'swrlb:greaterThan'}}))
MERGE (DP_V:DatatypeProperty {iri:'ex:violatesMaxHeight'}}))
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:1}]->(C_Building))
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:2}]->(DP_H))
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:3}]->(B_gt))
MERGE (r)-[:HAS_HEAD {order:1}]->(DP_V)) SET DP_V.label='violatesMaxHeight', DP_V.range='xsd:boolean' MERGE (litT:Literal {lex:'true', datatype:'xsd:boolean'}) MERGE (litF:Literal {lex:'false', datatype:'xsd:boolean'}) MERGE (r)-[:HAS_HEAD {order:2}]->(litT)) SET litT.label='violatesMaxHeight', litT.datatype='xsd:string' MERGE (r)-[:HAS_BODY {order:4}]->(litF))) SET litF.label='violatesMaxHeight', litF.datatype='xsd:string'
MERGE (R_R:Rule {id:'R_URB_HEIGHT_MAX_M_V'}) SET R_R.text='Building(?b)^hasHeightM(?b,?h)^swrlb:greaterThan(?h,75)->violatesMaxHeight(?b,true)'
